treephysics.config.despawn_behavior.tool:
NO_DESPAWN: Trees will not despawn at all
DESPAWN_SMALL: Trees with an amount of logs less than or equal to the value of SMALL_TREE_MAXIMUM will despawn
DESPAWN_ALL: Every tree will despawn
treephysics.config.despawn_time.tooltip: The amount of time in ticks a tree will exist before despawning. -1 to despawn when the tree stops moving
treephysics.config.drop_hanging_roots.to: If Hanging Roots should drop when rooted dirt is removed
treephysics.config.drop_items_on_despawn: If trees should drop their items when they despawn, when off they just get removed
treephysics.config.extra_push_multiplier: How much extra pushing strength should be applied for upright trees
treephysics.config.gravity_multiplier.to: How much extra gravity should be applied to trees
treephysics.config.gravity_multiplier_ti: How long in ticks the gravity multiplier should be applied. -1 for infinite
treephysics.config.impulse_force.tooltip: How much force should be applied to trees when chopped down
treephysics.config.impulse_torque.toolti: How much torque should be applied to trees when chopped down
treephysics.config.leaf_volume.tooltip: How loud the leaf breaking sound should be on trees
treephysics.config.leaf_walking_behavior:
NEVER: Entities cannot walk through leaves
ALWAYS: Entities can walk through all leaves
IN_SUB_LEVELS: Entities can only walk through leaves on sub-levels
IN_WORLD: Entities can only walk through leaves in the world
This is unrelated to leaves in world having no physics collision, see "Static Leaf Collision" instead
treephysics.config.leaf_walking_speed.to: Multiplier for entity walking speed when in leaves
treephysics.config.prevent_interacting_w: If interacting with trees (block placement, item use, etc) should be prevented
treephysics.config.remove_rooted_dirt.to: If rooted dirt should be converted to dirt when the log above it is broken
treephysics.config.requires_axe.tooltip: If an axe should be required to make tree sub-levels
treephysics.config.rooted_dirt_generatio: If rooted dirt should generate under trees
treephysics.config.rootless_tree_detecti: Allow tree sub-levels to be created without a root block, requiring at least one dirt and one natural leaf instead
treephysics.config.small_tree_maximum.to:
The largest amount of logs a tree can have before it is considered "small"
(see DESPAWN_BEHAVIOR)
treephysics.config.static_leaf_collision:
If leaves in world should have physics collision.
This is unrelated to entities being able to walk through leaves, see "Leaf Walking Behavior" instead
treephysics.config.title: Tree Physics Config
treephysics.config.tree_entity_damage.to: How much damage a falling tree should inflict on an entity when moving at 1 block per tick
